---
agent: agent
argument-hint: Add an entry to the CHANGELOG.md file for the changes made.
description: Add an entry to the CHANGELOG.md file for the changes made.
---

Study README.md and CHANGELOG.md. Run a diff between this branch and the main branch.

Add an entry under `## [Unreleased]` for the changes made:

- Be succinct and straight to the point
- Word the entry clearly for users
- Be explicit about the "symptom" that was addressed

Also rewrite or remove any entries under `## [Unreleased]` that are no longer relevant or accurate based on the diff.

Adapt README.md if necessary to reflect any user-facing changes.
